category_performance.note: Based on EN_20260309_01 measured at 37h post-publish. Tied for best with image_showcase. Very limited sample (1 post).
Based on EN_20260309_02 measured at 33h. Tied for best. Both top categories confirm that image-first content with short captions works.

Based on EN_20260309_03 measured at 20h. Lower engagement likely due to format novelty + low follower count limiting distribution, NOT format weakness. Competitor data strongly validates Grok interactive. Maintain at current allocation — reassess after 10+ Grok posts.
Based on EN_20260309_04 measured at 0h — essentially unmeasured. Zero engagement is an artifact of measurement timing, not content quality. Cannot draw conclusions. Maintain allocation.

ab_test_evaluation.variable: Caption style: provocative question vs ambient statement
ab_test_evaluation.early_signal: Variant B (ambient statement) marginally leads — avg 2.5 vs 2.0 engagement per post
ab_test_evaluation.conclusion: Test window expired (5/5 days) but only 4 posts were published (all on Mar 9), giving just 2 data points per variant. Sample far too small for any conclusion. Competitor trending data validates BOTH styles at massive scale (@imrubyreid 'lord have mercy...' 21,948 likes ambient; @IsabellaCruz_47 'Rate me from 1 to 10' 20,522 likes question). Recommendation: design a NEW A/B test on a DIFFERENT variable since caption style is validated by competitor evidence. Suggested next test: posting time optimization (morning vs evening US time) or image style (mirror selfie vs editorial).

posting_time_effectiveness.note: Measured at 37h — longest measurement window, highest engagement
Measured at 20h — shorter window may explain lower numbers
Measured at 0h — essentially unmeasured, cannot rank

outbound_effectiveness.note: No reciprocal engagement detected — followers stayed flat at 5 (+0). All 4 reply attempts failed (403). The 403 restriction is X's spam prevention for new/low-follower accounts. Outbound is currently likes-and-follows only. Consider pausing reply attempts until account gains standing, or continue escalating to operator for manual replies.

recommended_adjustments.description: Close current caption style test (insufficient data after 5 days). Design new A/B test on image style: mirror selfie (slots 1,3) vs editorial/studio (slots 2,4). Both caption styles validated by competitor data at scale.
recommended_adjustments.rationale: Only 4 posts across entire test period — cannot reach statistical significance. Competitor evidence validates both provocative questions and ambient statements equally. Image style variation is the next highest-leverage variable to test.

recommended_adjustments.description: Maintain current content mix (engagement_questions 40%, image_showcase 25%, grok_interactive 20%, self_quote_chains 15%). No changes recommended.
recommended_adjustments.rationale: Only 4 posts total (1 per category) with inconsistent measurement windows. Insufficient data to adjust mix. Engagement_questions and image_showcase tied at top, but sample too small. Need 10+ posts per category before making mix adjustments.

recommended_adjustments.description: Maintain current posting schedule (13:00, 17:00, 21:00, 00:30 UTC). No changes recommended.
recommended_adjustments.rationale: Measurement windows vary from 0h to 37h across slots. Cannot attribute engagement differences to time-of-day vs measurement duration. Need consistent 24h+ measurement for all slots before adjusting.

recommended_adjustments.description: Rotate all 4 outbound targets (imrubyreid, lucidevlinxyz, yuumispm, katekarsyn) — all within cooldown period. Continue follow-only strategy until reply restriction lifts. Prioritize larger accounts (>50K followers) for visibility value from likes.
recommended_adjustments.rationale: Zero reciprocal engagement from 16 likes and 6 follows across Mar 11 targets. All reply attempts failed (403). Outbound ROI is currently unmeasurable. Fresh target rotation per cooldown rules is standard practice.
